notes: Trainer views are selectors over canonical export artifacts.
Alias modes such as action_sft and process_reward do not duplicate rows.
Use split_paths when training requires train/validation/test isolation.
Positive rows require configured task-completion evidence.
Action SFT consumes the SFT message rows plus state_change metadata; no separate row copy is emitted.
Chosen rows inherit the same positive-label eligibility policy as SFT.
Positive reward rows exclude final-answer-only successes.
Rows allocate failed-rule reward deltas across event, final-answer, or episode targets.
Process reward is an alias over step_rewards.jsonl; no separate row copy is emitted.
Curriculum is prioritization metadata for repair/data-generation loops, not optimizer settings.
Trainer preflight records evidence for a downstream launch guard; it does not train, sandbox, or execute commands.
A ready preflight means the referenced gates and artifacts passed the configured handoff checks.
Use --require-dataset-version to bind launch readiness to an exact manifest dataset_version.
